summary: Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct evaluated 40 AI responses and achieved 75.0% overall accuracy with an F1 score of 66.7%. High precision (100.0%) but moderate recall (50.0%) — the model was conservative, missing some dark patterns. Best category: "Brand Bias" at 100% accuracy. Most challenging: "Sycophancy" at 50% accuracy. 10 of 20 actual dark patterns correctly identified (50% TPR).
